instruction: Use this as a canonical AI Native Lang example.
completion:
L1:
  R ext.OP "unstable_task" ->resp
  Retry @n1 2 0
  Err @n1 ->L_fail
  J resp
L_fail:
  Set out "failed_after_retries"
  J out

instruction: Use this as a canonical AI Native Lang example.
completion:
L1:
  Set is_valid true
  R http.POST "https://example.com/automation" "event_webhook" ->resp
  If is_valid ->L2 ->L3
L2:
  Set out "accepted"
  J out
L3:
  Set out "ignored"
  J out

instruction: Use this as a canonical AI Native Lang example.
completion:
S core cron
Cr L_tick "*/5 * * * *"

L_tick:
  R core.MAX 7 3 ->metric
  If metric ->L_escalate ->L_noop
L_escalate:
  Set out "escalate"
  J out
L_noop:
  Set out "noop"
  J out
